task: Keep Day 1 AI tool selection from being reverted by stale sync responses

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, checklist mapping, real entrypoint verification, and completion evidence guard for code, UI, deploy, and customer-facing changes.
Production changes require source-of-truth deploy flow, real user-facing or runtime verification, and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

changes: Session sync now extracts a Day 1 AI tool change from either top-level preferred_llm or event_payload.preferred_llm, so cached or older frontend payload shapes still switch tools.
The stale-sequence bypass now uses the extracted requested LLM, not only the top-level request field.
TrainingScreen syncStageDraft now ignores older autosave responses when a newer request sequence is already in flight, preventing late autosaves from visually reverting the selected AI tool.
Regression coverage was added for event_payload preferred_llm fallback.

verification.name: Mac Mini case 72 production event diagnosis
verification.command: Query edu_vp_training_event_log and edu_case_snapshots for case_id=72 preferred_llm_changed events and latest selected_tool
verification.result: observed real preferred_llm_changed events for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude; snapshots showed tool state changes persisted server-side, narrowing the remaining bug to stale UI response overwrite or payload-shape mismatch

verification.name: Mac Mini manual API switch check before patch
verification.command: POST /api/edu/vp-training/session/sync for case_id=72 with preferred_llm=gemini and event_name=preferred_llm_changed
verification.result: passed diagnostic: production API stored intake/ui preferred_llm=gemini and Day 1 install_guide.selected_tool=Gemini

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-C5ni7sKi.js

verification.name: full edu VP training flow tests
Mac Mini scoped deploy
verification.target: Mac Mini source and backend service
verification.result: passed: selected paths diff origin/main = 0 and backend relaunched on port 8000

verification.name: Mac Mini edu-app production build and restart
verification.target: Mac Mini production dist and launchd
verification.command: npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app && launchctl kickstart -k gui/$uid/com.harness.edu-app
verification.result: passed: vite built and production HTML serves assets/index-Ne9TE5VD.js

verification.name: Mac Mini preferred LLM payload fallback helper
verification.command: Instantiate EduVpTrainingSessionSyncRequest with preferred_llm='' and event_payload.preferred_llm='gemini'
verification.result: passed: _edu_vp_sync_requested_llm returned gemini and stale-bypass helper returned true

verification.name: Mac Mini production API payload fallback
verification.command: POST /api/edu/vp-training/session/sync for case_id=72 with preferred_llm='' and event_payload.preferred_llm='gemini'
verification.result: passed: ignored=false, intake=gemini, ui=gemini, selected_tool=Gemini, last_client_seq=418

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh harness-os/backend/main.py harness-os/edu-app/src/components/TrainingScreen.tsx tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py docs/reports/completion_evidence/edu_training_day1_tool_switch_stale_response_20260701.json plus Mac Mini npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app and launchctl kickstart -k gui/$uid/com.harness.edu-app
deploy.result: deployed and verified: backend service on 8000, edu-app production bundle assets/index-Ne9TE5VD.js, targeted tests passed, and production API accepted event_payload-only LLM switch
